description: Schema library mapping canonical action descriptions to multimodal matching rules. Each entry describes one action and the visual/audio/pose evidence that should be present in a matching video segment.

schema_fields.name: Human-readable action name.
schema_fields.description: Natural language description used for embedding matching in Week 3.
schema_fields.aliases: Alternative phrasings the user might type.
schema_fields.tags: Free-form tags (e.g. domain, body part, environment).
schema_fields.visual_cues: Object/scene labels expected from YOLO detections.
schema_fields.audio_cues: Sound or speech events expected from audio analysis.
schema_fields.pose_cues: Body/hand keypoint patterns expected from MediaPipe.
schema_fields.confidence_floor: Minimum fused confidence required to keep a candidate segment.

actions.name: Person walking
actions.description: A person moves on foot at a steady walking pace through the scene.

actions.name: Person running
actions.description: A person moves rapidly on foot with both feet leaving the ground between strides.

actions.name: Person waving
actions.description: A person raises one hand and moves it side to side in a greeting gesture.

actions.name: Person clapping
actions.description: A person brings both hands together repeatedly in front of the body.

actions.name: Person drinking
actions.description: A person lifts a cup, glass, or bottle to their mouth and drinks.

actions.name: Person sitting down
actions.description: A person transitions from standing to sitting on a chair, sofa, or bench.
